title: Policy: Restore Defaults with Policy applied
scenario: Restore Defaults action in Poly Studio Mobile app does not unlock or reset policy-locked settings on Poly device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
2. Navigate to Settings → Reset Device → Restore Defaults.
3. Tap "Restore Defaults" to initiate the factory reset/restore process.
4. After the device restarts and reconnects, navigate to the Device Settings screen for the Poly device.
5. Verify that any settings previously locked by a policy (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) remain locked and are not editable.
6. Check that the values of policy-affected settings still reflect the policy-defined values (i.e., they were not reset to factory defaults).
expected: Policy-locked settings remain locked and retain their policy-defined values after the Restore Defaults action is performed.
